arts.ttl: Photo: Barcelona fans show support for Hansi Flick in Germany ahead of Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Members of the fanbase at La Liga giants Barcelona on Tuesday made use of the opportunity to show their support for head coach Hansi Flick. This of course comes ahead…

arts.ttl: Nico Williams issues transfer ultimatum to Arsenal, Chelsea & Barcelona
arts.sum: Nico Williams sends a firm transfer message to Arsenal, Chelsea and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid miss out: Spanish prodigy opts for move to Newcastle
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two leading clubs have this week been dealt something of a blow on the transfer front. This comes amid confirmation that Málaga talent Antonio Cordero has made the call…

arts.ttl: Club Brugge in talks with Hamburger SV over former Barcelona midfielder
arts.sum: BILD are reporting that Club Brugge have began preliminary discussions with Hamburger SV over the transfer of midfielder Ludovit Reis. The 24-year-old has a contract with the Bundesliga 2 club…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides update on Barcelona contract talks
arts.sum: Hansi Flick signed only a two-year contract when he succeeded Xavi as Barcelona manager.

arts.ttl: Dortmund travel to team hotel without duo ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund travelled to their team hotel without two key players ahead of their clash with Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona earmark surprise position for summer transfer plans
arts.sum: Barcelona, like most clubs, are in the midst of their planning for the summer transfer window, and a surprising shift in their plans has been reported. The Blaugrana are still unsure of their capacity to strengthen this summer due to their salary limit situation. The headline from a recent MD report on their transfer plans […] The post Barcelona earmark surprise position for summer transfer plans appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona set new target for Camp Nou return as new permit is granted
arts.sum: Barcelona will finish this season at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys this season, but the pressure is on to make their way back down Montjuic to Camp Nou as soon as possible. As the delay for their return approaches six months, there is hope that they could be back early next season. The financial impact […] The post Barcelona set new target for Camp Nou return as new permit is granted appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Borussia Dortmund-Barcelona: Robert Lewandowski doubt and Alejandro Balde out
arts.sum: Barcelona will be sending a weaker team to Germany to face Borussia Dortmund at 21:00 CEST at the Signal Iduna Park, after losing starting left-back Alejandro Balde over the weekend. There are also doubts up fron for Hansi Flick’s side. arts.ttl: FC Barcelona to Wear White Shorts vs Borussia Dortmund in Champions League
arts.sum: FC Barcelona will sport an altered kit combination for their crucial Champions League match against Borussia Dortmund tonight.
